ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "open_timestamp_utc" INTEGER /* Open timestamp in UTC */,
  "close_timestamp_utc" INTEGER /* Close timestamp in UTC */,
  "open" TEXT /* Open price */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price during the interval */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price during the interval */,
  "close" TEXT /* Close price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange providing the data */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization at the close timestamp */,
  "price_change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in price from the previous close */,
  "volume_change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change in trading volume from the previous interval */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "cryptocurrency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol of the cryptocurrency */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cryptocurrency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "cryptocurrency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data entry
Reference to the exchange providing the data
Market capitalization at the close timestamp
Percentage change in price from the previous close
Percentage change in trading volume from the previous interval
Number of trades during the interval
Unique identifier for each access entry
